column1: # Shared side-by-side cotyping prompts — consumed by Scripts/compare-cotyping.sh
# kind: next-word        — caret after a finished word; suggestion starts a new word
#       word-completion  — caret mid-word on a fragment no dictionary word equals;
#                          the suggestion MUST extend the typed word (Cotypist parity)
#       valid-fragment   — caret mid-word on a fragment that is already a word;
#                          extending it and starting the next word are both correct
#       typo             — the trailing word is misspelled; a correction should appear
# Prompts stay single-line so System Events keystrokes reproduce them exactly.
